description: Describe temple candles as burning only while their ONBIT is set

replacements.new:
<ROUTINE CANDLES-D (RARG)
	 <COND (<EQUAL? .RARG ,M-OBJDESC>
		<TELL "On the two ends of the altar are ">
		<COND (<FSET? ,CANDLES ,ONBIT>
		       <TELL "burning ">)>
		<TELL "candles." CR>
		<RTRUE>)>>

<ROUTINE CANDLES-FCN ()
